name: Sitting Puppy
subject: animals/dog
prompt: a cute fluffy puppy sitting up with big round eyes, floppy ears, a small smiling mouth with its tongue out, a curled-up tail, and chunky little paws, looking happy and friendly

name: Golden Retriever
subject: animals/dog
prompt: a friendly Golden Retriever standing in profile, a long flowing coat with feathery fur on the legs and tail, soft floppy ears, a gentle smile, and a wagging tail held high

name: Spotty Dalmatian
subject: animals/dog
prompt: a perky Dalmatian standing alert, a slim body covered in scattered round spots, tall folded ears, a long thin tail, an eager open-mouth smile, and a collar around its neck

name: Wrinkly Pug
subject: animals/dog
prompt: a chubby Pug sitting down with a wrinkled flat face, big bulging eyes, a short curled tail, small folded ears, and a stocky round body, looking sweet and a little goofy

name: Long Dachshund
subject: animals/dog
prompt: a long-bodied Dachshund standing on very short legs, a low stretched-out body, long droopy ears, a pointed snout, and a slim tail, with a cheerful smiling face

name: Fluffy Poodle
subject: animals/dog
prompt: an elegant Poodle standing proudly, a curly fluffy coat with rounded puffs of fur on its legs, head, and tail, a slim snout, dainty paws, and a small bow on top of its head

name: Puppy Portrait
subject: animals/dog
prompt: a close-up portrait of a puppy's face filling the frame, large soulful eyes, a button nose, soft fluffy fur with a little tuft on top, one ear flopped over, looking straight ahead

name: Dog with a Bone
subject: animals/dog
prompt: a happy cartoon dog lying down with a big chunky bone between its front paws, ears perked up, eyes bright with excitement, tail mid-wag, ready to chew its favorite treat

name: Puppy in a Doghouse
subject: animals/dog
prompt: a cute puppy peeking out of the round doorway of a wooden doghouse, a bone-shaped sign above the door, a food bowl beside it, and a little ball on the grassy ground nearby

name: Dog and Puppy
subject: animals/dog
prompt: a gentle mother dog sitting beside her small puppy, leaning down to nuzzle its head, both with soft fur and loving smiles, sitting together on a patch of grass

name: Happy Corgi
subject: animals/dog
prompt: a cheerful Corgi standing on short stubby legs, a long low body, big upright pointed ears, a fluffy rounded rear, a wide open-mouth smile, and its tongue sticking out happily

name: Dog Playing Fetch
subject: animals/dog
prompt: an energetic dog running across a park with a ball in its mouth, body leaning forward mid-leap, ears flapping back, tail streaming out, a tree and a couple of bushes in the background
